Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Kurt Miller, Esq. for Plaintiff: Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Adnan Atallah, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Raya Mann, Daniel Theppanya and Ainoy Southavilay as follows:
Damages $16,704.48, for a total of $16,704.48
Judgment signed in open court.
